name: Cheesy Puff-Top Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed bouillon cube and cottage cheese; let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the grated Parmesan until combined.
3. Beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cottage cheese mixture.
5. Place the tomatoes cut-side up in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 5 minutes.
7. Spoon the cottage cheese mixture over the cut surface of each tomato.
8. Broil the tomatoes, approximately 5 inches from the heat source, for 3 to 5 minutes.
Serves 6; contains 38 calories per serving (tomato half).
